title: Loki’s Shadow Over the Island
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #13, Road, Luffy, Unknown person #14 as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I HATE TO DO THIS, BUT WE'RE LEAVING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Serves you right, ya giant perv.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Please let the outside be Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What lies just out of sight?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
